exclusions.reason: Treated as system/environmental constraint, not methodology error

STAGE_1_INPUT_UNDERSTANDING.name: Input Understanding & Decomposition
STAGE_1_INPUT_UNDERSTANDING.description: Failures in understanding input patents, decomposing claims, and identifying preprocessing steps

Claim Decomposition & Structure.description: Large claims not properly broken down into elements; elements analyzed without context of full claim

Preprocessing & Input Step Recognition.description: Failure to correctly classify preprocessing/postprocessing steps; treating them as novel when they are foundational

Patent Document Coverage.description: Failure to analyze all sections of patent (preamble, claims, specification)

STAGE_2_CLAIM_ANALYSIS.name: Claim Language & Term Analysis
STAGE_2_CLAIM_ANALYSIS.description: Failures in interpreting claim language, identifying corresponding text between patents

Term Interpretation & Consistency.description: Treating claim terms verbatim instead of using specification context; inconsistent interpretation

Corresponding Text Identification.description: Verdict summarizes/paraphrases rather than quoting actual corresponding text from patent

STAGE_3_NOVELTY_ASSESSMENT.name: Novelty Assessment
STAGE_3_NOVELTY_ASSESSMENT.description: Failures in understanding novelty concept and assessing against prior art

Novelty vs. Inventive Step Distinction.description: Confusion between novelty and inventive step; missing explanation of technical differences

Person Skilled in Art Consideration.description: Failure to consider assessment from perspective of person skilled in the art

STAGE_4_INVENTIVE_STEP_ASSESSMENT.name: Inventive Step Assessment
STAGE_4_INVENTIVE_STEP_ASSESSMENT.description: All errors related to assessing whether differences from prior art constitute inventive step

Inventive Step Reasoning & Judgment.description: Incorrect marking of inventive step; hallucinated reasoning; threshold issues; missing justification
Inventive Step Reasoning & Judgment.impact: CRITICAL - Direct impact on final verdict
